{{Quote|I don't need your story, just your credits.|Auben|<ref name="Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown">''[[Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown]]''</ref>}}
'''Auben''' was a [[Black market/Legends|black market]] dealer on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] who lived inside the abandoned [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Monastery]].

==Biography==
Auben was a well-known supplier of illegal goods on Korriban when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ferus Olin]] purchased a pair of [[handwarmers]] from her while on a mission as an excuse to obtain information about [[Granta Omega]] and [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] from her outside of [[Dreshdae]]. As they were about to make a deal with her they were attacked by a [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] army. Auben led Anakin and Ferus into the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] in exchange for them having saved her life under the impression that the army would not enter the ruins.

When the army did not stop she led the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] deeper into the ruins and into an ancient hangar which was being used by a mysterious [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] as a temporary base. A small group of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] were being stored in the hangar, when Auben, Ferus and Anakin entered they attacked. During the fight between the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and the droids, Auben tried to sneak aboard a ship docked in the hangar to steal several valuable items she had intended to collect earlier. When she was discovered by [[Dooku/Legends|the Sith Lord]] in the hangar, he stopped her heart, instantly killing her.

==Personality and traits==
Auben was a paranoid woman who disliked sharing information with her customers and waited until they had spent enough time in the area for her to get a close look at them. She was motivated by credits, though she was willing to help others if they had helped her first.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown]]'' {{1st}}
